ul.li: Determines where each input section ends up in output
Builds mapping table: (file, section, offset) → output_offset
Required for: translating relocation site addresses
Assigns final virtual address to every symbol
Required for: relocation target address lookup
Needs mapping table to find relocation site in output
Needs symbol table to find target address

div.p: patch_value = symbol_address + addend - site_address ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ^^^^^^^^^^^^ from symbol from section resolution (M2) merging (M1)
